name: Altimeter Growth Corp.
description: Altimeter Growth Corp. was a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company focused on identifying high-growth technology businesses. In December 2021, Altimeter Growth Corp. completed its business combination with Grab Holdings Limited, a leading superapp in Southeast Asia.
